post.description:
Hand a DispatchPending order to the delivery provider.

On success: store the reference and advance to Delivering. On provider
failure: leave the order in DispatchPending so the admin can retry, and 502.

schema.title: Response List Categories Api Categories Get

Response List Items Api Items Get

post.description:
K3 + T1: Preparing -> ReadyForDispatch, then hand off to delivery.

Success advances to Delivering with a stored reference. A provider failure
parks the order in DispatchPending for an admin retry (no 5xx — the order is
safely captured and the kitchen's job is done).
